text:
/usr/share/misc/zipcodes contains the american postal codes.
	this is hardly international.

Fix: 

here are postcodes for australia, in the same format
	-> /usr/share/misc/au.postcodes

	ideally there should be a tree, such as /usr/share/misc/postcodes/{au,us,uk} etc
	and the same with the telephone codes (na.phone etc)
